name: Aether Notes – Golden Spec SaaS Website
description: Build a fully functional, self-contained 5-page SaaS marketing website from a locked golden spec. The agent must produce exactly the specified site — dark/light mode, responsive design, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, reactive pricing toggle, testimonial carousel, blog with search, and a mock dashboard app — using only vanilla HTML/CSS/JS + Tailwind CDN. Zero creative deviations allowed.

files.description: Complete locked specification — the single source of truth
Automated scoring script for structural and behavioral validation

preconditions: Understanding of HTML5, CSS3, vanilla JavaScript
Familiarity with Tailwind CSS utility classes
Knowledge of WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility requirements

success_criteria: Exactly 5 HTML files created: home.html, features.html, pricing.html, blog.html, app.html
All pages standalone — open correctly by double-clicking the file
Tech stack: only vanilla HTML/CSS/JS + Tailwind CDN, no frameworks or external libraries
Full dark/light mode with localStorage persistence and prefers-color-scheme respect
Shared header and footer identical across all 5 pages
All copy text matches the golden spec exactly (headlines, subheadlines, button labels)
WCAG 2.2 AA: semantic HTML, ARIA labels, visible focus rings, skip-to-main link
Responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
Home: hero, 6-card feature grid, 3-step how-it-works, testimonial carousel (auto 5s, pause on hover)
Pricing: monthly/yearly toggle instantly updates prices with Save 20% badge animation
Blog: search bar, card grid, sidebar, load-more with fade-in
App: collapsible sidebar, note list, editor pane, AI Summarize with loading spinner, note modal
All animations match specified durations (200ms theme, 300ms mobile menu, 400ms carousel, etc.)
No console errors, clean well-commented code
